title: Shantae and the Pirate's Curse Gameplay Map

narrative.description: Shantae and the Pirate's Curse (2014) is a acclaimed metroidvania title recognized in retro gaming lists for its distinctive mechanics, pacing, and lasting influence on the genre.
narrative.core_loop: Explore non-linear maps, gain abilities, backtrack, and defeat area guardians.
